description_long: This is a female adult figure with a casual, summery appearance, featuring a sleeveless, deep V-neck top and short shorts. She has a single thick braid draped over her right shoulder and wears a gold armband on her left upper arm. Her posture is relaxed, with arms slightly outstretched and feet flat on the ground, suggesting a neutral standing pose. The figure is barefoot, and her facial features are stylized, with glasses and a composed expression. The back of her top is open, revealing part of her upper back, and her overall build is athletic. The asset is detailed with visible muscle definition and realistic body proportions, suitable for urban or park environments.
description: A barefoot adult woman in casual summer attire, with a braided hairstyle, glasses, and a gold armband, standing in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deep V-neck top, glasses, braid over the right shoulder, and relaxed arm position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the braid, and the gold armband on the upper arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open-back design of the top, the braid down the back, and the overall athletic build.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the braid's length, the side profile of the face, and the relaxed stance.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless deep V-neck top and short shorts with a gold armband and glasses
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
attribute_hairstyle: long hair styled in a single thick braid
